columns.name: AVDNR
columns.description: Unique identifier for the department

columns.name: AVDNAVN
columns.description: Name of the department

columns.name: AVDFLAG
columns.description: Indicates if the department is active

columns.name: DATABASENAVN
columns.description: Name of the database associated with the department

columns.name: TO_BOKSTAV
columns.description: Starting letter for filtering or sorting purposes

columns.name: OMRAADE
columns.description: Code representing the area of operation for the department

columns.name: VERKSTED_OMRAADE
columns.description: Code representing the workshop area associated with the department

columns.name: MINUS_BEHOLDNING
columns.description: Indicates if there is a minus stock holding for the department

columns.name: MELLOMFRAKT
columns.description: Code indicating whether inter-departmental freight is applied

columns.name: STEDSFRAKT
columns.description: Code indicating the type of place freight for the department

columns.name: LAGER_TYPE
columns.description: Type of warehouse associated with the department

columns.name: PRIS_INNKJOP
columns.description: Code indicating if purchase price is applicable for the department

columns.name: KLIENT
columns.description: Code representing the client associated with the department

columns.name: KLARGJ_MASKIN
columns.description: Code indicating if a machine is ready for use by the department

columns.name: HOVEDLAGER_MASKIN
columns.description: Code indicating if the main warehouse machine is in use by the department

columns.name: PARTIVARE
columns.description: Code or description of particular matters related to the department

columns.name: ORDRE_KREDSTOPP
columns.description: Code indicating if there is a credit hold on orders for the department

columns.name: VISES_WEB
columns.description: Indicates if the department is visible in web applications

columns.name: BUTIKK
columns.description: Code indicating if the department operates a store

columns.name: KORN_MOTTAK
columns.description: Code indicating if grain reception is handled by the department

columns.name: FABR_TERM
columns.description: Code or term related to fabrication processes in the department

columns.name: ADM
columns.description: Code indicating administrative functions for the department
